name: Time to Escape
short_description: "Time to Escape" is a cooperative puzzle game. Finding yourselves in a locked room, you and your friend, who is on the other side of the wall, must work together to solve complex puzzles. This must be done before the countdown timer reaches zero.
detailed_description:
"Time to Escape" is a cooperative puzzle game. Finding yourselves in a locked room, you and your friend, who is on the other side of the wall, must work together to solve complex puzzles. This must be done before the countdown timer reaches zero. The twist is that the clues for solving the puzzles are always on your friend's side!



As you progress through new levels and encounter new puzzles, you will gather bits of information about what is happening to you. Use your wits and imagination to figure out why you are trapped!

Game Features:
- Cooperative Puzzles – A multitude of puzzles requiring active interaction between two players to solve.
- Colorful Cutscenes - Diversify the breaks between levels and add new details about the surrounding events.
- Interpretation of Classic Puzzles for Cooperative Gameplay - Adaptations of classic games such as tic-tac-toe, minesweeper, and others, for cooperative gameplay.
- Solo (Training) Mode - A mode where a player can familiarize themselves with the initial puzzles and understand their mechanics without the need for multiplayer. Note that not all puzzles are comfortably solvable alone. Therefore, it is highly recommended to try them in cooperative mode as intended.
- Voice Chat - You can use it directly during the game, or communicate through any other favorite communication channel of yours.
- Each Match is Unique - The random generation of the number and difficulty of puzzles ensures a constantly engaging experience.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
